import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skip_done = false
    while i < n and not skip_done
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          i = i + 1
        else
          skip_done = true
        end
      when None
        skip_done = true
      end
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      mut tok_done = false
      while i < n and not tok_done
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(b)
          if is_ws(b)
            tok_done = true
          else
            i = i + 1
          end
        when None
          tok_done = true
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn bsearch(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = list.len(xs) - 1
  mut found: Option<Int> = None
  mut done = false
  while lo <= hi and not done
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    match list.get(xs, mid)
    when Some(v)
      if v == target
        found = Some(mid)
        done = true
      else if v < target
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid - 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  found
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let xs = parse_ints(line1)

let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

match bsearch(xs, target)
when Some(i)
  println("index=#{i}")
when None
  println("not_found")
end
